title: Accessibility
body:
Accessibility Statement of Commitment

At DSC, we are committed to providing a respectful, accessible, and inclusive environment for all employees, clients, and the public. We believe in integration and equal opportunity, and we are dedicated to meeting the needs of individuals with disabilities in a timely manner. We will do so by removing and preventing barriers to accessibility and by meeting our requirements under the Accessibility for Ontarians with Disabilities Act (AODA).

Our Approach

Information and Communications

We will provide company information and communications in accessible formats upon request.

Employment

We notify the public and our employees that we provide accommodations during the recruitment process and throughout the employment lifecycle.

Customer Service

Our services are provided in a way that respects the dignity and independence of people with disabilities.

Information and Communications

We will provide company information and communications in accessible formats upon request.

Feedback and Document Requests

 We welcome feedback on how we provide accessible customer service. If you would like to share your thoughts, or if you require a copy of our Customer Service or IASR policies in an alternative format, please contact:

Noor Aziz, Chief People Officer

noor@datasolutionsinc.ca

seo.title: Accessibility Policy | Data Solutions Consulting
seo.description: Data Solutions Consulting outlines its accessibility practices to ensure inclusive digital access, usability, and compliance for all users.
